title: Perfect Numbers
hints: Use a queue (deque) to generate perfect numbers in order.
Start with '1' and '2' in the queue.
For each number x, the perfect number is x + reverse(x) to form a palindrome.
After generating a perfect number, add x+'1' and x+'2' to the queue for the next iterations.
Process numbers in order (FIFO) to get the Ath perfect number.
The pattern: 1st is '11' (from '1'), 2nd is '22' (from '2'), 3rd is '1111' (from '11'), etc.
